en.extract:
Sykes's lark (Galerida deva) is a species of lark found in the dry open country of India. Its distribution is mainly restricted to central India, although stray records have been found elsewhere on the sub-continent. It is identified by its prominent crest and its overall rufous colouration. It has streaks on its breast which are less prominent than those found in the Oriental skylark.
It can imitate the calls of 34 other birds within its habitat. 


Taxonomy and systematics
Originally, Sykes's lark was classified as belonging to the genus Alauda. Alternate names for Sykes's skylark include Deccan crested lark, Deccan lark, Sykes's crested-lark, tawny crested lark and tawny lark.


Diet
It is an insectivore.


References

'''Sykes's lark''' ('''''Galerida deva''''') is a species of [[lark]] found in the dry open country of [[India]]. Its distribution is mainly restricted to [[central India]], although stray records have been found elsewhere on the [[Indian subcontinent|sub-continent]]. It is identified by its prominent [[Crest (feathers)|crest]] and its overall rufous colouration. It has streaks on its breast which are less prominent than those found in the [[Oriental skylark]].

It can imitate the calls of 34 other birds within its habitat.<ref>{{cite journal|doi=10.3184/175815617X14951979279259|title=Jack of all calls and master of few: Vocal mimicry in the Tawny Lark (Galerida deva)|journal=Avian Biology Research|volume=10|issue=3|page=174|year=2017|last1=Crisologo|first1=Taylor|last2=Joshi|first2=Viral|last3=Barve|first3=Sahas|s2cid=89825992}}</ref> 

==Taxonomy and systematics==
Originally, Sykes's lark was classified as belonging to the genus ''[[Alauda]]''. Alternate names for Sykes's skylark include '''Deccan crested lark''', '''Deccan lark''', '''Sykes's crested-lark''', '''tawny crested lark''' and '''tawny lark'''.<ref>{{Cite web|url=http://avibase.bsc-eoc.org/species.jsp?avibaseid=4A6368CF5D87C1A7|title=Galerida deva - Avibase|website=avibase.bsc-eoc.org|access-date=2016-12-10}}</ref>

== Diet ==
It is an insectivore.<ref>{{Cite journal |last=Bhorania |first=Nirali |last2=Vekaria |first2=L.C. |last3=Sakarvadia |first3=H.L. |last4=Parmarand |first4=K.B. |last5=Ponkia |first5=H.P. |date=2019-06-01 |title=Effect of Saline Irrigation Water on Growth and Yield of Chickpea (Cicer arietinumL.)Varieties |journal=Agropedology |volume=28 |issue=1 |doi=10.47114/j.agroped.2018.jun6 |issn=0971-1570}}</ref>

zh.extract:
塞氏凤头百灵（学名：Galerida deva），是百灵科凤头百灵属的一种，为印度的特有种。该物种的保护状况被评为无危。
塞氏凤头百灵的平均体重约为20.0克。栖息地包括耕地和亚热带或热带的（低地）干燥疏灌丛。
